name: AWS IAM Service-Specific Credential Modified
description: Modifying a service-specific credential alters how an IAM user authenticates to supported AWS services like CodeCommit or SES. This activity may suggest an adversary is attempting to regain or maintain access by rotating credentials or disabling them. It can also be part of an evasion strategy to quietly shift authentication mechanisms after compromise. Monitoring such changes is important to detect credential tampering or post-exploitation activity.
author: Sunil Bharti & David Agni
